configurations.name: Learning Dashboard (Python HTTP Server)
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='/Users/m0239/Documents/Claude Code社内作成';http.createServer((req,res)=>{let f=path.join(dir,req.url==='/'?'/learning-dashboard.html':req.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const mime={'html':'text/html','js':'application/javascript','css':'text/css','png':'image/png'}[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain';res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime});res.end(d);}});}).listen(process.env.PORT||8080,()=>console.log('ready'));

configurations.name: Training Tools TOP
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='/Users/m0239/Documents/Claude Code社内作成/.claude/worktrees/gifted-fermi-ea6cf4';http.createServer((req,res)=>{let f=path.join(dir,req.url==='/'?'/index.html':req.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const mime={'html':'text/html','js':'application/javascript','css':'text/css','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','svg':'image/svg+xml'}[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain';res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime});res.end(d);}});}).listen(process.env.PORT||8081,()=>console.log('ready'));

configurations.name: Prompt Dojo
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='/Users/m0239/Documents/Claude Code社内作成/.claude/worktrees/hardcore-pasteur-c46adc';http.createServer((req,res)=>{let f=path.join(dir,req.url==='/'?'/prompt-dojo.html':req.url);fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(f);const mime={'html':'text/html','js':'application/javascript','css':'text/css','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','svg':'image/svg+xml'}[ext.slice(1)]||'text/plain';res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime});res.end(d);}});}).listen(process.env.PORT||8082,()=>console.log('ready'));
